assignments.name: horario_util

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN lead_status IN ('AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO','HORARIOS_ENVIADOS','SOLICITAR_NOVAS_OPCOES','AGUARDANDO_EMAIL') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_AGENDA'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_AGENDAR') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_PRE_AGENDA'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_PEDIU_VALOR','QUALIFICADO_NEGOCIANDO','QUALIFICADO_COM_OBJECAO','QUALIFICADO_COMPARANDO','QUALIFICADO_ANALISANDO') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_NEGOCIACAO'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO','QUALIFICADO_INTERESSADO','QUALIFICANDO') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_QUALIFICACAO'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('NOVO_LEAD','COLETANDO_INFO','LEAD_FRIO','LEAD_INICIANTE') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_INICIAL'
    ELSE 'FOLLOWUP_INICIAL'
  END AS next_followup_type
FROM sdr_julia_lead_memory
WHERE lead_status NOT IN (
  'REUNIAO_CONFIRMADA',
  'DESQUALIFICADO',
  'SEM_ORCAMENTO',
  'SEM_NEGOCIO',
  'NAO_PERFIL',
  'SO_CURIOSO',
  'HUMANO'
)
AND IFNULL(followup_count, 0) < {{ Number($json.fup_count_max || 5) }}
AND IFNULL(breakup_sent, 0) = 0
AND phone IS NOT NULL
AND phone <> ''
AND conversation_id IS NOT NULL
AND conversation_id <> ''
AND conversation_id > 0
AND (
  (
    lead_status IN ('NOVO_LEAD','COLETANDO_INFO','QUALIFICANDO','LEAD_FRIO','LEAD_INICIANTE')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO','QUALIFICADO_INTERESSADO')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL {{ $json.teste_fiorelli?" 1 MINUTE ":" 2 HOUR" }}
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_PEDIU_VALOR','QUALIFICADO_NEGOCIANDO','QUALIFICADO_COM_OBJECAO','QUALIFICADO_COMPARANDO','QUALIFICADO_ANALISANDO')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 4 HOUR
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_AGENDAR')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO','HORARIOS_ENVIADOS','SOLICITAR_NOVAS_OPCOES')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  )
)
AND (
  last_followup_at IS NULL
  OR last_followup_at < NOW() - INTERVAL {{ $json.teste_fiorelli?" 1 MINUTE ":$json.fup_minute_max || "60" + " MINUTE" }} 
)
AND (
  last_user_reply_at IS NULL
  OR last_followup_at IS NULL
  OR IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, '1900-01-01') <= IFNULL(last_followup_at, '1900-01-01')
)
ORDER BY updated_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_memory (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,

  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_angle,
  last_followup_message,
  last_question,
  breakup_sent,
  last_followup_at,

  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,

  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_status || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_1_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_2_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_day || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_date || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_period || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_min || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_max || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.email || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dify_uuid || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.account_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.conversation_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.contact_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.system_event || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || $json.answer || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_system_event || null) }},

  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) + 1 }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_type || $json.next_followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_angle || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.clean_answer || $json.mensagem_sem_tags || $json.answer || $json.active_fup_base || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_question_extracted || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.active_fup_mode === 'BREAKUP' ? 1 : ($json.should_send_breakup || 0)) }},
  NOW(),

  'FOLLOWUP',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_reply_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_flag || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},

  NOW(),
  NOW()
)

ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

  name = IF(VALUES(name) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(name) != '', VALUES(name), name),
  lead_summary = IF(VALUES(lead_summary) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_summary) != '', VALUES(lead_summary), lead_summary),
  lead_status = IF(VALUES(lead_status) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_status) != '', VALUES(lead_status), lead_status),
  last_intent = IF(VALUES(last_intent) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_intent) != '', VALUES(last_intent), last_intent),

  selected_option = IF(VALUES(selected_option) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option) != '', VALUES(selected_option), selected_option),
  selected_option_start = IF(VALUES(selected_option_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option_start) != '', VALUES(selected_option_start), selected_option_start),

  option_1_start = IF(VALUES(option_1_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_1_start) != '', VALUES(option_1_start), option_1_start),
  option_2_start = IF(VALUES(option_2_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_2_start) != '', VALUES(option_2_start), option_2_start),

  requested_day = IF(VALUES(requested_day) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_day) != '', VALUES(requested_day), requested_day),
  requested_date = IF(VALUES(requested_date) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_date) != '', VALUES(requested_date), requested_date),
  requested_period = IF(VALUES(requested_period) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_period) != '', VALUES(requested_period), requested_period),
  requested_time_min = IF(VALUES(requested_time_min) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_min) != '', VALUES(requested_time_min), requested_time_min),
  requested_time_max = IF(VALUES(requested_time_max) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_max) != '', VALUES(requested_time_max), requested_time_max),

  email = IF(VALUES(email) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(email) != '', VALUES(email), email),
  dify_uuid = IF(VALUES(dify_uuid) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(dify_uuid) != '', VALUES(dify_uuid), dify_uuid),

  account_id = IF(VALUES(account_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(account_id), account_id),
  conversation_id = IF(VALUES(conversation_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(conversation_id), conversation_id),
  contact_id = IF(VALUES(contact_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(contact_id), contact_id),

  system_event = VALUES(system_event),

  last_user_message = IF(VALUES(last_user_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_user_message) != '', VALUES(last_user_message), last_user_message),
  last_ai_message = IF(VALUES(last_ai_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_ai_message) != '', VALUES(last_ai_message), last_ai_message),
  last_system_event = VALUES(last_system_event),

  followup_count = COALESCE(followup_count, 0) + 1,
  last_followup_type = VALUES(last_followup_type),
  last_followup_angle = VALUES(last_followup_angle),
  last_followup_message = VALUES(last_followup_message),
  last_question = VALUES(last_question),
  breakup_sent = GREATEST(COALESCE(breakup_sent, 0), VALUES(breakup_sent)),
  last_followup_at = NOW(),

  last_outbound_message_type = VALUES(last_outbound_message_type),

  error_flag = VALUES(error_flag),
  error_message = VALUES(error_message),

  retry_count = VALUES(retry_count),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

);

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": {{ $json.lead_summary.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "lead_status": {{ $json.lead_status.toJsonString() || "\"QUALIFICANDO\"" }},
    "last_intent": {{ $json.last_intent ? $json.last_intent.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "name": {{ $json.name ? $json.name.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},

    "followup_type": {{ $json.followup_type ? $json.followup_type.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "followup_stage": {{ $json.followup_stage ? $json.followup_stage.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "followup_count": {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
    "selected_attempt": {{ Number($json.selected_attempt || 1) }},
    "followup_angle": {{ $json.followup_angle ? $json.followup_angle.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "should_send_breakup": {{ Number($json.should_send_breakup || 0) }},

    "fup_message_base": {{ $json.fup_message_base ? $json.fup_message_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "breakup_message_base": {{ $json.breakup_message_base ? $json.breakup_message_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "active_fup_base": {{ $json.active_fup_base ? $json.active_fup_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "active_fup_mode": {{ $json.active_fup_mode ? $json.active_fup_mode.toJsonString() : "\"FOLLOWUP\"" }},

    "system_event": {{ $json.system_event ? $json.system_event.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_system_event": {{ $json.last_system_event ? $json.last_system_event.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_user_message": {{ $json.last_user_message ? $json.last_user_message.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_ai_message": {{ $json.last_ai_message ? $json.last_ai_message.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }}
  },
  "query": {{ $json.active_fup_mode === 'BREAKUP'
    ? '"[FOLLOW-UP AUTOMÁTICO - BREAKUP] Use active_fup_base como mensagem principal. Não faça pergunta nova. Apenas refine a linguagem e devolva no formato da Julia."'
    : '"[FOLLOW-UP AUTOMÁTICO] Use active_fup_base como mensagem principal, respeite o estado atual da conversa, não reinicie a descoberta, não repita a última pergunta e devolva a resposta final no formato da Julia."'
  }},
  "response_mode": "streaming",
  {{ $json.dify_uuid ? '"conversation_id": "' + $json.dify_uuid + '",' : "" }}
  "user": "{{ $json.phone }}"
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE sdr_julia_lead_memory
SET
  lead_status = 'HUMANO',
  last_system_event = 'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE phone = {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || '') }};

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_history (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_angle,
  last_followup_message,
  last_question,
  breakup_sent,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  'HUMANO',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || null) }},
  'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_angle || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.mensagem_final || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_question_extracted || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.breakup_sent || 0) }},
  NOW(),
  'FOLLOWUP_ESCALADO_HUMANO',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW()
);

assignments.name: clean_answer
assignments.value: =Acabei de notificar nosso especialista para continuar a conversa com você.\n\nNosso atendimento é das 8h às 17h de segunda à sexta.

assignments.name: horario_util

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN lead_status IN ('AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO','HORARIOS_ENVIADOS','SOLICITAR_NOVAS_OPCOES','AGUARDANDO_EMAIL') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_AGENDA'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_AGENDAR') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_PRE_AGENDA'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_PEDIU_VALOR','QUALIFICADO_NEGOCIANDO','QUALIFICADO_COM_OBJECAO','QUALIFICADO_COMPARANDO','QUALIFICADO_ANALISANDO') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_NEGOCIACAO'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO','QUALIFICADO_INTERESSADO','QUALIFICANDO') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_QUALIFICACAO'
    WHEN lead_status IN ('NOVO_LEAD','COLETANDO_INFO','LEAD_FRIO','LEAD_INICIANTE') THEN 'FOLLOWUP_INICIAL'
    ELSE 'FOLLOWUP_INICIAL'
  END AS next_followup_type
FROM sdr_julia_lead_memory
WHERE lead_status NOT IN (
  'REUNIAO_CONFIRMADA',
  'DESQUALIFICADO',
  'SEM_ORCAMENTO',
  'SEM_NEGOCIO',
  'NAO_PERFIL',
  'SO_CURIOSO',
  'HUMANO'
)
AND IFNULL(followup_count, 0) < {{ Number($json.fup_count_max || 5) }}
AND IFNULL(breakup_sent, 0) = 0
AND phone IS NOT NULL
AND phone <> ''
AND conversation_id IS NOT NULL
AND conversation_id <> ''
AND conversation_id > 0
AND (
  (
    lead_status IN ('NOVO_LEAD','COLETANDO_INFO','QUALIFICANDO','LEAD_FRIO','LEAD_INICIANTE')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO','QUALIFICADO_INTERESSADO')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL {{ $json.teste_fiorelli?" 1 MINUTE ":" 2 HOUR" }}
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_PEDIU_VALOR','QUALIFICADO_NEGOCIANDO','QUALIFICADO_COM_OBJECAO','QUALIFICADO_COMPARANDO','QUALIFICADO_ANALISANDO')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 4 HOUR
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('QUALIFICADO_AGENDAR')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR
  )
  OR
  (
    lead_status IN ('AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO','HORARIOS_ENVIADOS','SOLICITAR_NOVAS_OPCOES')
    AND IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, updated_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  )
)
AND (
  last_followup_at IS NULL
  OR last_followup_at < NOW() - INTERVAL {{ $json.teste_fiorelli?" 1 MINUTE ":$json.fup_minute_max || "60" + " MINUTE" }} 
)
AND (
  last_user_reply_at IS NULL
  OR last_followup_at IS NULL
  OR IFNULL(last_user_reply_at, '1900-01-01') <= IFNULL(last_followup_at, '1900-01-01')
)
ORDER BY updated_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

  selected_option_start = IF(VALUES(selected_option_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option_start) != '', VALUES(selected_option_start), selected_option_start),

  option_1_start = IF(VALUES(option_1_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_1_start) != '', VALUES(option_1_start), option_1_start),
  option_2_start = IF(VALUES(option_2_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_2_start) != '', VALUES(option_2_start), option_2_start),

  requested_day = IF(VALUES(requested_day) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_day) != '', VALUES(requested_day), requested_day),
  requested_date = IF(VALUES(requested_date) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_date) != '', VALUES(requested_date), requested_date),
  requested_period = IF(VALUES(requested_period) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_period) != '', VALUES(requested_period), requested_period),
  requested_time_min = IF(VALUES(requested_time_min) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_min) != '', VALUES(requested_time_min), requested_time_min),
  requested_time_max = IF(VALUES(requested_time_max) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_max) != '', VALUES(requested_time_max), requested_time_max),

  email = IF(VALUES(email) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(email) != '', VALUES(email), email),
  dify_uuid = IF(VALUES(dify_uuid) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(dify_uuid) != '', VALUES(dify_uuid), dify_uuid),

  account_id = IF(VALUES(account_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(account_id), account_id),
  conversation_id = IF(VALUES(conversation_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(conversation_id), conversation_id),
  contact_id = IF(VALUES(contact_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(contact_id), contact_id),

  system_event = VALUES(system_event),

  last_user_message = IF(VALUES(last_user_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_user_message) != '', VALUES(last_user_message), last_user_message),
  last_ai_message = IF(VALUES(last_ai_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_ai_message) != '', VALUES(last_ai_message), last_ai_message),
  last_system_event = VALUES(last_system_event),

  followup_count = COALESCE(followup_count, 0) + 1,
  last_followup_type = VALUES(last_followup_type),
  last_followup_angle = VALUES(last_followup_angle),
  last_followup_message = VALUES(last_followup_message),
  last_question = VALUES(last_question),
  breakup_sent = GREATEST(COALESCE(breakup_sent, 0), VALUES(breakup_sent)),
  last_followup_at = NOW(),

  last_outbound_message_type = VALUES(last_outbound_message_type),

  error_flag = VALUES(error_flag),
  error_message = VALUES(error_message),

  retry_count = VALUES(retry_count),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_history (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,

  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_angle,
  last_followup_message,
  last_question,
  breakup_sent,
  last_followup_at,

  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_status || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_1_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_2_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_day || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_date || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_period || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_min || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_max || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.email || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dify_uuid || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.account_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.conversation_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.contact_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.system_event || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || $json.answer || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_system_event || null) }},

  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) + 1 }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_type || $json.next_followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_angle || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.clean_answer || $json.mensagem_sem_tags || $json.answer || $json.active_fup_base || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_question_extracted || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.active_fup_mode === 'BREAKUP' ? 1 : ($json.should_send_breakup || 0)) }},
  NOW(),

  'FOLLOWUP',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_reply_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_flag || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW()
);

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": {{ $json.lead_summary.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "lead_status": {{ $json.lead_status.toJsonString() || "\"QUALIFICANDO\"" }},
    "last_intent": {{ $json.last_intent ? $json.last_intent.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "name": {{ $json.name ? $json.name.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},

    "followup_type": {{ $json.followup_type ? $json.followup_type.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "followup_stage": {{ $json.followup_stage ? $json.followup_stage.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "followup_count": {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
    "selected_attempt": {{ Number($json.selected_attempt || 1) }},
    "followup_angle": {{ $json.followup_angle ? $json.followup_angle.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "should_send_breakup": {{ Number($json.should_send_breakup || 0) }},

    "fup_message_base": {{ $json.fup_message_base ? $json.fup_message_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "breakup_message_base": {{ $json.breakup_message_base ? $json.breakup_message_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "active_fup_base": {{ $json.active_fup_base ? $json.active_fup_base.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "active_fup_mode": {{ $json.active_fup_mode ? $json.active_fup_mode.toJsonString() : "\"FOLLOWUP\"" }},

    "system_event": {{ $json.system_event ? $json.system_event.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_system_event": {{ $json.last_system_event ? $json.last_system_event.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_user_message": {{ $json.last_user_message ? $json.last_user_message.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }},
    "last_ai_message": {{ $json.last_ai_message ? $json.last_ai_message.toJsonString() : "\"\"" }}
  },
  "query": {{ $json.active_fup_mode === 'BREAKUP'
    ? '"[FOLLOW-UP AUTOMÁTICO - BREAKUP] Use active_fup_base como mensagem principal. Não faça pergunta nova. Apenas refine a linguagem e devolva no formato da Julia."'
    : '"[FOLLOW-UP AUTOMÁTICO] Use active_fup_base como mensagem principal, respeite o estado atual da conversa, não reinicie a descoberta, não repita a última pergunta e devolva a resposta final no formato da Julia."'
  }},
  "response_mode": "streaming",
  {{ $json.dify_uuid ? '"conversation_id": "' + $json.dify_uuid + '",' : "" }}
  "user": "{{ $json.phone }}"
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE sdr_julia_lead_memory
SET
  lead_status = 'HUMANO',
  last_system_event = 'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE phone = {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || '') }};

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_history (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_angle,
  last_followup_message,
  last_question,
  breakup_sent,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  'HUMANO',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || null) }},
  'ESCALADO_HUMANO_FOLLOWUP',
  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_angle || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.mensagem_final || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_question_extracted || $json.fup_message_base || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.breakup_sent || 0) }},
  NOW(),
  'FOLLOWUP_ESCALADO_HUMANO',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW()
);

assignments.name: clean_answer
assignments.value: =Acabei de notificar nosso especialista para continuar a conversa com você.\n\nNosso atendimento é das 8h às 17h de segunda à sexta.
